'''竏嗾-sh-w-j''' ('''katashwejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:outboob|outboob]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-sh-w-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:outboob|outboob]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗾-sh-w-j
|-
! Lemma
| katashwejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitashwejoko|thitashwejoko]] || [[word:jitashwejoko|jitashwejoko]] || [[word:shitashwejoko|shitashwejoko]] || [[word:kitashwejoko|kitashwejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutashwejoko|thuthutashwejoko]] || [[word:jujutashwejoko|jujutashwejoko]] || [[word:shushutashwejoko|shushutashwejoko]] || [[word:kukutashwejoko|kukutashwejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutashwejoko|thutashwejoko]] || [[word:jutashwejoko|jutashwejoko]] || [[word:shutashwejoko|shutashwejoko]] || [[word:kutashwejoko|kutashwejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutashwejoko|thutashwejoko]] || [[word:jutashwejoko|jutashwejoko]] || [[word:shutashwejoko|shutashwejoko]] || [[word:kutashwejoko|kutashwejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetashwejoko|thetashwejoko]] || [[word:jetashwejoko|jetashwejoko]] || [[word:shetashwejoko|shetashwejoko]] || [[word:ketashwejoko|ketashwejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotashwejoko|thothotashwejoko]] || [[word:jojotashwejoko|jojotashwejoko]] || [[word:shoshotashwejoko|shoshotashwejoko]] || [[word:kokotashwejoko|kokotashwejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotashwejoko|thotashwejoko]] || [[word:jotashwejoko|jotashwejoko]] || [[word:shotashwejoko|shotashwejoko]] || [[word:kotashwejoko|kotashwejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotashwejoko|thotashwejoko]] || [[word:jotashwejoko|jotashwejoko]] || [[word:shotashwejoko|shotashwejoko]] || [[word:kotashwejoko|kotashwejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦtashwejoko|thﾃｦtashwejoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦtashwejoko|jﾃｦtashwejoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦtashwejoko|shﾃｦtashwejoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦtashwejoko|kﾃｦtashwejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatashwejoko|thathatashwejoko]] || [[word:jajatashwejoko|jajatashwejoko]] || [[word:shashatashwejoko|shashatashwejoko]] || [[word:kakatashwejoko|kakatashwejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatashwejoko|thatashwejoko]] || [[word:jatashwejoko|jatashwejoko]] || [[word:shatashwejoko|shatashwejoko]] || [[word:katashwejoko|katashwejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatashwejoko|thatashwejoko]] || [[word:jatashwejoko|jatashwejoko]] || [[word:shatashwejoko|shatashwejoko]] || [[word:katashwejoko|katashwejoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shatashwejithi|shatashwejithi]] || [[word:shatashwejiji|shatashwejiji]] || [[word:shatashwejishi|shatashwejishi]] || [[word:shatashwejiki|shatashwejiki]]
